allow: PowerShell(try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:9333/json/version" -TimeoutSec 3 | Out-Null; Write-Host "alive" } catch { Write-Host "dead: $_" })

PowerShell(try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:9333/json/version" -TimeoutSec 3 | Out-Null; Write-Host "alive" } catch { Write-Host "dead, relaunching"; $chrome = "C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe"; Start-Process -FilePath $chrome -ArgumentList "--headless=new","--disable-gpu","--remote-debugging-port=9333","--user-data-dir=$env:TEMP\\claude-chrome-profile-fc4","about:blank" | Out-Null; Start-Sleep 2 })
